sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented; tactical RPG with grid-based movement

special_mechanics.name: Grid-based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Tactical turn-based movement on grid-based maps. Each character class has assigned movement range.

special_mechanics.name: Unit Mounting/Dismounting
special_mechanics.description: Mounted units can dismount, changing abilities, stats, and movement range.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative). Fire Emblem: Mystery of the Emblem is a tactical RPG, not a platformer. Physics parameters relevant to platformers (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration, sub-pixel systems) are not applicable to this game's mechanics. Movement is grid-based and turn-based rather than continuous real-time physics-based movement.
